title: Bundled standard modern weapon progression
description: Canonical ladders and shared mechanics for **`usesStandardModernProgression`** on **`palladium-weapon-proficiency.schema.json`**. Engines select **`bundles[key]`** using **`standardModernProgressionKey`** (or default from **`gameSystems`**). **Adjust tier numbers** to match each printing; values here mirror the Nightbane-style pattern (aimed milestones **1, 3, 6, 9, 12, 15**; burst **4, 7, 10, 13**; Recognize Weapon Quality **30% + 6%/level**).

gameSystems.description: Game lines this bundle is intended for (should align with catalog **`gameSystems`**).

stackingRule.description: How **`levelTiers`** rows combine (e.g. cumulative aimed and cumulative burst).

levelTiers.description: Full shared ladder; catalog rows may supply a **tier-1-only** override.

untrainedPenalties.description: Strike / RoF / malfunction or other penalties when firing without the W.P.

weaponTypeOverrides.description: Optional exceptions keyed by weapon-type slug (for example **`revolver`**) so one bundle can define a universal ladder while specific weapon groups override selected values.

combatNotes.description: System-wide combat caveats for this bundle (for example, whether modern W.P. strike bonuses stack with hand-to-hand bonuses).

systemConstraints.description: Engine-facing constraints and stacking rules that apply to every weapon using this bundle.

matchesWeaponProficiencyIds.description: Optional explicit catalog ids this override applies to (for example **`wp_revolver`**).

levelTiers.description: Tier rows that override or augment the bundle ladder for matching weapons. Typical use: replace the level-1 aimed bonus for one weapon type.

stackingRule.description: Override-specific merge rule when these tier rows differ from the bundle default.

notes.description: Book citation guidance for this specific override.
